heroHeadline: Kyiv Skeptical Russia Will Honor Easter Ceasefire Despite Putin Announcement
heroSubtitle: Ukrainian officials express lingering doubts over Moscow's commitment to uphold the agreed Orthodox Easter truce, citing Russia's history of ceasefire violations
footerNote: Data sourced from UN OHCHR, ISW, CSIS, Ukrainian MoD, US DoD, NATO, IAEA, and major news outlets including Reuters, BBC, AP, Al Jazeera, Bloomberg, and Kyiv Independent. Casualty figures are estimates; Russia has never released official figures.
